occupation: Founder | Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer at Be Unskripted
headline: Digital Transformation Consultant | Technology & Operations Director | Change Leader
summary:
As a highly accomplished Change, Strategy and Transformation leader, I bring in-house and client-side expertise in creating impactful operational, digital and change solutions that drive measurable results in high-impact, evolving and competitive media sectors, ensuring alignment with overarching corporate goals and customer-focused outcomes.

With a focus on driving innovation, I have been instrumental in shaping business strategies that elevate brands, optimise internal and external capabilities, and drive sustained growth. My expertise lies in ensuring agility and resilience of operations in today's constantly changing markets and designing frameworks that ensure smooth transitions, promote buy-in, manage culture, and drive the execution of transformative programmes.

Key to my success is my data-driven approach, utilising metrics, understanding of consumer behaviour, enhanced consumer awareness and loyalty, creating seamless customer journeys, stakeholder reporting and sophisticated performance tracking systems to monitor progress, evaluate ROI, and adjust programmes, ensuring that transformation initiatives are risk aligned, agile and impactful. 

Known for my open, collaborative approach, I empower teams to embrace change, leverage new opportunities, drive improvements across functional areas, and showcase a deep understanding of coaching and mentoring talented individuals as part of professional development to ensure strong succession pipelines.

My career journey has encompassed working in a large UK-based business, managing European transformation programmes and, latterly, as a business consultancy founder. In all of these ventures, I have been called upon to direct business improvements, increase revenue, expand market share, lead technology transformations and act as a centralised point of contact for clients, partners, and vendors. I enjoy the variety and mix of skills that I have honed and ensure that these are utilised effectively to meet internal needs.  

I am keen to connect with like-minded individuals and explore opportunities where I can contribute my skills and experience. Feel free to contact me through LinkedIn or contact me directly. I look forward to connecting with you.

experiences.title: Founder | Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer
experiences.description:
Founded a consultancy to provide a range of services and support to aid in organisational scaling, process improvements, sales, change and advertising. 

* Act as the conduit between operations, finance, sales, customer service and executive leadership teams; providing leadership, vision and direction for transformation initiatives.
* Advise on strategic planning, M&A, integrations, and day-to-day functional improvements, ensuring a strong customer and revenue-focused approach. 
* Lend expert digital insight to businesses and actively research the latest trends, tools and best-practice processes, to support digital transformation projects – including Salesforce, Automation and AI
* Develop relationships with operations, finance, sales, customer service and executive leadership teams; translating organisational requirements into actionable insights.

experiences.title: EU Commercial Transformation Director
experiences.description:
I initially joined the business as UK Sales Operations Director and was promoted to European Commercial Transformation Director to drive optimisation of digital operations throughout Europe. 

* A key Member and contributor to the European Technology Board and Commercial Leadership Board, adding to the short, medium, and long-term company roadmaps. 
* Successfully doubled digital revenue to £multi-hundred-million and significantly grew profit through cost optimisations over 7 years.
* Led the restructure programme for the lead-to-cash portfolio, creating a centralised European toolset and managing stakeholders in multiple EU countries, initially deploying in the UK, BE & FR, before expanding further across Europe.
* Led the deployment of technology tools, including HubSpot, Salesforce (CRM & CPQ), business intelligence capabilities and automated accounting; significantly increased operational uptime and reduced manual interventions.
* Launched programmatic and automated revenue streams to diversify revenue income, growing from $0 to $multi-million ARR in 3 years in Europe.
* Directed the automation of AI and ML development and implementation, to improve response times to sales queries.
* Represented the business at industry meetings and was a pivotal contributor to the Standards Committee to set industry standards and governance.

experiences.title: Group Product Manager - Media Brands (Global)
experiences.description:
I initially joined the business as Head of Sales Operations and was promoted to Group Product Manager to drive transformation of our Product Management processes. I had responsibility for three proprietary products: Platform (Vanilla), CMS (PROOF), and Ads (Bordeaux).

* Led senior-level discussions with finance, sales, technology, and operations business units in the UK, USA, and Australia to drive consensus on building a new centralised platform to aid in company acquisitions.
* A key player in the integration of people, processes, resources, and assets following the acquisition of Net Communities.
* Increased programmatic advertising revenue by up to 80%, improving performance with a "reader-first" approach to ad placements. 
* Increased saleable inventory by 27%
* Built a repeatable direct sold inventory pricing model, to improve yield. 
* One of the first movers to Programmatic Guaranteed, becoming the top EU Programmatic Guaranteed Partner for Google.

experiences.title: Head of Commercial Partnerships
experiences.description:
Acquired by Future PLC in July 2015 

Reporting to the CEO, I supported and drove commercial partnerships, new products and operations at Net Communities, with a focus on Data and Programmatic.

experiences.title: Founder/Director and Chief Technical Experience Officer (CTXO)
experiences.description: Co-founded a disruptive digital sports startup to change the way amateur sports is captured - Responsible for developing the product, including MVP hardware, software and testing.

education.field_of_study: Business Management with Leadership and Innovation
education.description: AWARDED the Hewitt Recruitment Award for best overall grades in the business school at graduation. Modules Including: • Economics • Management Concepts • Marketing • Financial Concepts • Creative Problem Solving • Leadership Principles and Practice • Management Accounting and Finance • Leadership in Action • Innovation and Change Management • Global Strategy • Entrepreneurship • Business Ethics and Values

recommendations:
Richard Bon

I had the pleasure of hiring Ben as our UK Sales Operations Director, with a focus on Sales Ops Transformation, during a period of rapid digital growth. From the moment he joined, Ben brought a nice balance of leadership/strategic insight with operational/practical delivery; seamlessly bridging both the Commercial and Technology world.

Upon joining, Ben zeroed in on process efficiency and established a new team in his department, focused on customer success, complete with supporting systems and processes. Ben’s attention to detail and innovative approach lead to positive engagement scores from our partners, while working closely with industry bodies to drive accountability improvement for all of OOH. Ben supported us during a pivotal time of growth and this transformation work was an important factor in CC doubling its digital revenues over that period.

Ben also played a key role in the development of our Programmatic product and proposition, LaunchPAD; an initiative he helped scale across 10+ European markets. Navigating this complex ecosystem required collaboration with multiple teams across the business, from tech to sales; via product and ad ops.

These successes culminated in Ben’s promotion to the European Tech organisation, where he established the Commercial Transformation hub. His focus on optimising systems and processes, particularly with Salesforce and HubSpot, will help drive positive change and elevate our end to end operations.

In summary, Ben is a dynamic and results-driven professional who thrives in pressure environments. I am confident that he will continue to achieve great success in his future endeavour and I would, personally, vouch for both his integrity & ability!

Martin Corke

Ben makes things happen. His intelligent and communicative approach is as rare as it is fantastic. I have greatly enjoyed working with him through a significant and successful period of change at Clear Channel UK. Whether consulting or in a full-time role I know Ben will be a terrific asset.

Richard Bon

articles.title: Better Collaboration Holds the Key to Transparency
